name: ship-gate
title: Ship Gate
summary: An independent GO/NO-GO release gate that trusts no build claim and blocks on unwaivable conditions.
description: Runs cold on a finished deliverable, re-derives the numbers/facts/files from artifacts rather than the build log, and returns a GO/NO-GO with explicit blocking reasons.
author: Warden Curated Pack

task.description: Path or description of the finished deliverable to gate.
